SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.model.state

Interface GameState

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameOverState, PausedState, PlayingState
public interface GameState
State interface for different game states (State Pattern). Each state (Playing, Paused, GameOver) handles events according to its specific rules.
Author:
Dong, Jia.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GameState
    handleNewGameRequest()
    Handles new game request.
    GameState
    handlePauseRequest()
    Handles pause/unpause request.
    DownData
    onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles DOWN event.
    ViewData
    onLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles LEFT event.
    ViewData
    onRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles RIGHT event.
    ViewData
    onRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles ROTATE_CCW event.
    ViewData
    onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
    Handles ROTATE event.

  • Method Details

    • onDownEvent

      DownData onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Handles DOWN event.
      Parameters:
      event - MoveEvent
      Returns:
      DownData, or null if not allowed in current state

    • onLeftEvent

      ViewData onLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Handles LEFT event.
      Parameters:
      event - MoveEvent
      Returns:
      ViewData, or null if not allowed in current state

    • onRightEvent

      ViewData onRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Handles RIGHT event.
      Parameters:
      event - MoveEvent
      Returns:
      ViewData, or null if not allowed in current state

    • onRotateEvent

      ViewData onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Handles ROTATE event.
      Parameters:
      event - MoveEvent
      Returns:
      ViewData, or null if not allowed in current state

    • onRotateCCWEvent

      ViewData onRotateCCWEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Handles ROTATE_CCW event.
      Parameters:
      event - MoveEvent
      Returns:
      ViewData, or null if not allowed in current state

    • handlePauseRequest

      GameState handlePauseRequest()
      Handles pause/unpause request.
      Returns:
      Next GameState (e.g., Playing -> Paused)

    • handleNewGameRequest

      GameState handleNewGameRequest()
      Handles new game request.
      Returns:
      New PlayingState
